title: Congolanthus longidens
taxonomy: Congolanthus longidens is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Africa. Within the Acanthaceae family, Congolanthus longidens is likely to be classified as part of the tribe Acantheae. Further classification may include the genus and species levels, but more specific information is needed. As part of its broader classification, Congolanthus longidens is a flowering plant belonging to the angiosperm clade.
uses: Congolanthus longidens is a plant species native to tropical Africa, and while information on its medicinal uses is limited, it is reported to have potential benefits in traditional medicine.
